packageManager.title: Availability Package Management
packageManager.description: Manage your hotel's availability packages with real-time synchronization
packageManager.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this package? This action cannot be undone.
packageManager.createFirstPackage: Create your first availability package to start accepting bookings

validation.pastDate: Start date cannot be in the past
validation.endDateBeforeStart: End date must be after start date
validation.invalidWeekday: Start date must match your hotel's check-in day
validation.dateOverlap: Package dates overlap with existing packages
validation.cannotReduceRooms: Cannot reduce rooms below already booked count

rules.title: Package Management Rules
rules.weekdayRestriction: Check-in day must match hotel's preferred weekday
rules.bookingRestrictions: Packages with bookings cannot be edited or deleted
rules.deleteRestriction: Only future packages with no bookings can be deleted
rules.roomIncrease: Room count can only be increased if there are active bookings
rules.realTimeSync: All changes sync in real-time across the platform
